creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Failing reason is test case timed out.  Also happens on other architectures and branches:


https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/9781/testReport/junit/sys.kern/sysv_test/msg/

https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-aarch64-test/6/testReport/junit/sys.kern/sysv_test/msg/
